evals.prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for a Node.js app: lint, test, build, and deploy to staging on merge to main.
evals.expected_output: A workflow YAML with separate jobs or steps for lint/test/build/deploy, dependency caching, and a deploy job gated on the main branch.
expectations: Uses dependency caching (actions/cache or setup-node cache)
Deploy step only runs on the main branch
Jobs run in parallel where there is no dependency

evals.prompt: We use GitLab CI. Add security scanning and test stages to our Python service pipeline.
evals.expected_output: A .gitlab-ci.yml with stages including security scanning (SAST/dependency scan) and pytest, using caching for pip.
expectations: Defines stages and jobs in valid GitLab CI syntax

evals.prompt: Set up AWS CodePipeline for a containerized service: build the image, push to ECR, deploy to ECS.
evals.expected_output: Pipeline definition with CodeBuild buildspec for image build/push and an ECS deploy stage, with IAM noted as least-privilege.
expectations: Buildspec builds and pushes the image to ECR
Mentions least-privilege IAM for the pipeline roles
